title: 10 best herbal capsules for hormonal imbalance
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for hormonal imbalance are a natural remedy that aims to restore balance to the body's hormonal system. These capsules contain carefully selected herbs, such as Maca, Ashwagandha, and Chasteberry, which work together to regulate hormone production and alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances, including hot flashes, mood swings, and fatigue. By taking these capsules, women can experience improved energy levels, reduced stress, and a more stable emotional state, allowing them to live a healthier, more balanced lifestyle.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dong quai capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain a unique blend of plant-based compounds that work to restore balance to the body's endocrine system. Specifically, dong quai has been shown to support the production and regulation of estrogen, progesterone, and thyroid hormones, which are essential for maintaining optimal reproductive health. By addressing imbalances in these hormone levels, dong quai capsules can help alleviate symptoms such as PMS, menopause hot flashes, and mood swings, promoting overall hormonal balance and well-being.
remedy_properties: Estrogen-regulating properties: Dong quai helps to balance estrogen levels by modulating the activity of enzymes involved in estrogen metabolism, reducing symptoms of estrogen dominance and promoting a healthy menstrual cycle.

Anti-inflammatory effects: The anti-inflammatory compounds present in dong quai capsules may help to reduce inflammation that can contribute to hormonal imbalances, particularly in cases of endometriosis and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).

Adaptogenic properties: Dong quai's adaptogenic nature allows it to help the body adapt to physical and emotional stressors, which is thought to play a role in hormonal imbalance by reducing cortisol levels and promoting a sense of calm and balance.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the dong quai plant contain a rich source of estrogenic compounds, making them effective in regulating menstrual cycles and alleviating symptoms of menopause.

Rhizomes: The rhizomes of the dong quai plant have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe hormonal imbalances and reduce inflammation associated with hormonal fluctuations.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh angelica sinensis roots weighing approximately 500 grams.
Clean and dry the harvested roots by gently brushing off dirt and debris.
Cut the dried roots into small pieces and grind them into a fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground root powder with a carrier agent such as gelatin or starch in a ratio of 1:5 by weight and fill capsules with approximately 500 milligrams of the mixture.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container and prepare them for consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chaste tree capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain a natural herb called Vitex agnus-castus, which has been traditionally used to regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of PMS, and support women's reproductive health. The active compound, flavonoids, works by stimulating the pituitary gland, thereby regulating the balance of hormones in the body, including estrogen and progesterone. This leads to a reduction in symptoms such as bloating, mood swings, and breast tenderness, promoting a healthier balance of hormones for overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Agonist activity on progesterone receptors: Chaste tree capsules have been shown to stimulate the production of progesterone, helping to regulate menstrual cycles and alleviate symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS).

Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects: The herbal extract has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation in the body, which is often associated with hormonal imbalances, as well as antioxidant effects that protect against oxidative stress.

Regulation of estrogen levels: Chaste tree capsules have been shown to modulate estrogen levels by inhibiting the production of estrogen and reducing its binding to receptors, helping to alleviate symptoms of estrogen dominance.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the chaste tree plant are used in herbal medicine because they contain a high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to regulate hormone levels and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
Seeds: Chaste tree seeds are used due to their rich content of essential fatty acids, vitamins, and minerals that help to support the endocrine system and promote hormonal balance.
remedy_recipe: Measure and prepare the ingredients gathering dried vitex agnus castus flowers and finely grind 500 grams of them.
Combine the ground vitex with 250 grams of gelatin and 100 milliliters of glycerin.
Mix the combined ingredients in a bowl for at least 30 minutes to ensure uniformity.
Fill capsules with the mixture using a capsule filling machine or manually and seal tightly.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container at room temperature protected from light.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Red clover capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because it is rich in isoflavones, particularly genistein and daidzein, which mimic the effects of estrogen in the body. These compounds have been shown to help balance estrogen levels, alleviating symptoms associated with menopause such as hot flashes and night sweats. Additionally, red clover capsules may also support progesterone production, helping to regulate menstrual cycles and reduce symptoms of PMS. By promoting a healthy balance of hormones, red clover capsules can improve overall reproductive health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Isoflavones: Red clover contains isoflavones, particularly biochanin A and formononetin, which have been shown to mimic estrogen in the body, helping to alleviate symptoms of menopause such as hot flashes and night sweats.

Phytoestrogens: The phytoestrogens in red clover capsules can help to balance out the levels of estrogen in the body by binding to estrogen receptors, which can reduce the risk of hormonal imbalances and related health issues.

Flavonoids: Red clover's flavonoid content has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which are often associated with hormonal imbalance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in phytoestrogens, red clover roots have been traditionally used to support hormone balance and alleviate menopausal symptoms.
Seeds: Containing isoflavones, red clover seeds help regulate estrogen levels and alleviate hot flashes and night sweats associated with hormonal imbalance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh red clover flowers weighing approximately 250 grams during full bloom stage.
Dry the harvested red clover flowers in a warm dry place for 7-10 days or use a food dehydrator.
Grind 100 grams of dried red clover flowers into fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 500 mg of powdered red clover with 250 mg of pure gelatin and 100 mg of magnesium stearate in a small bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately for use or storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Black cohosh capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain a unique combination of compounds that mimic the effects of estrogen in the body. This allows them to help alleviate symptoms associated with menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, by regulating hormone levels. Additionally, black cohosh has been shown to inhibit the production of enzymes that convert testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone linked to acne, hair loss, and other issues. By balancing hormone levels, black cohosh capsules can promote overall hormonal harmony and alleviate related symptoms.
remedy_properties: Estrogen-like effects: Black cohosh contains compounds that mimic estrogen, which can help alleviate symptoms of menopause such as hot flashes and night sweats by binding to estrogen receptors in the body.

Antioxidant activity: Black cohosh's antioxidant properties can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which are thought to contribute to hormonal imbalances and related symptoms like mood swings and fatigue.

Anti-inflammatory effects: The anti-inflammatory compounds in black cohosh may help reduce inflammation in the body, which is associated with hormonal imbalances and can exacerbate symptoms like joint pain and mood changes.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of black cohosh contain a high concentration of triterpene glycosides, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and estrogenic properties, making them effective in regulating hormonal balance.
Rhyzomes: Black cohosh rhyzomes are used because they contain a unique combination of alkaloids and glycosides that help to normalize estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality actaea racemosa roots, rinse them thoroughly with filtered water, and chop into small pieces.
Dry the chopped roots in a well-ventilated area or using a food dehydrator on low heat for 6 hours.
Grind dried actaea racemosa root into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix 1000mg of ground actaea racemosa root with 500mg of gelatin and 10ml of distilled water, then fill into vegetarian capsules.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years, or refrigerate for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because of its adaptogenic properties that help regulate the body's response to stress, a common factor contributing to hormonal imbalances. The herb contains hyperforin and hypericin, which have been shown to influence hormone production and metabolism, particularly for estrogen, progesterone, and testosterone. By normalizing hormone levels, St John's Wort capsules can alleviate symptoms such as mood swings, hot flashes, and sleep disturbances associated with hormonal imbalance. This natural approach promotes overall endocrine system balance and well-being.
remedy_properties: Hyperforin: St John's Wort contains hyperforin, a compound that has been shown to inhibit the breakdown of neurotransmitters like serotonin and dopamine, which are important for hormone regulation. This helps to balance hormonal levels.

Flavonoids and phenolic acids: The flavonoids and phenolic acids present in St John's Wort have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation associated with hormonal imbalance and promote overall endocrine health.
Hypericin: Hypericin is a naphthodianthrone that has been shown to have antioxidant properties, helping to protect the body from oxidative stress and damage caused by imbalanced hormones.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Rich in hyperforin and hypericin, the flowers are believed to help regulate hormone production and balance, alleviating symptoms of hormonal imbalances.
Buds: Containing a high concentration of bioactive compounds, the buds are thought to aid in modulating hormonal activity and promoting overall hormonal balance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2 cups of fresh st. john's wort leaves and flowers on a sunny day in june or july.
Dry the plant material in a warm dark place for at least 7 days until crispy and brittle.
Crush the dried plant material into small pieces using mortar and pestle to release essential oils.
Mix 1 tablespoon of crushed st. john's wort with 1 tablespoon of silica gel and store in an airtight container for 24 hours.
Fill empty capsules with 500 milligrams of powdered st. john's wort mixture and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has been shown to mimic the effects of cortisol, a hormone produced by the adrenal glands. This can help to regulate and balance cortisol levels, which is often disrupted in individuals experiencing hormonal imbalances. Additionally, licorice root has been found to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may also contribute to its ability to support hormonal equilibrium. By addressing these underlying hormonal issues, licorice capsules can provide relief from symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance such as fatigue, mood swings, and irregular menstrual cycles.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: Helps to regulate cortisol levels by inhibiting the production of cortisol-stimulating hormones, which can contribute to adrenal fatigue and hormonal imbalance.
Flavonoids: Exhibit estrogenic properties, which can help to balance estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause, PMS, and other hormonal imbalances.

Triterpenoids: Possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress that can contribute to hormonal imbalance and related conditions such as endometriosis and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the licorice plant contain a wealth of bioactive compounds, including glycyrrhizin and saponins, which help regulate hormone levels and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.

Rhyzomes: The rhizomes of licorice have been traditionally used to treat menstrual disorders and other female reproductive issues, due to their ability to balance estrogen levels and reduce inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried glycyrrhiza glabra root powder weighing 500 grams.
Mix the powder with 20 grams of borago officinalis leaf extract and 10 grams of ashwagandha root powder.
Fill #00 gelatin capsules with a mixture of 300 milligrams of the blend and 50 milligrams of vitamin e oil.
Store the prepared capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for six months.
Administer one to two capsules three times daily for a minimum duration of ninety days.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to stimulate the liver's natural detoxification processes, which can help remove excess hormones from the body. The plant's bioactive compounds also have a regulating effect on the body's endocrine system, helping to normalize hormone production and balance cortisol levels. Additionally, dandelion root has been shown to support adrenal function, allowing for optimal thyroid hormone regulation. By addressing hormonal imbalances, dandelion capsules can promote overall hormonal health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Diuretic effect: Dandelion capsules can help remove excess hormones from the body, particularly estrogen, by increasing urine production and promoting detoxification.

Antioxidant properties: Dandelion's antioxidants may help protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation caused by hormonal imbalances, which can lead to conditions like endometriosis and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).

Hormone-balancing flavonoids: Dandelion contains flavonoid compounds that have been shown to regulate hormone levels and improve insulin sensitivity, which can help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as mood swings and acne.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in inulin, a prebiotic that supports gut health and promotes hormone regulation.
Seeds: Containing omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants, they help to balance hormones and reduce inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh taraxacum officinale leaves and flowers at dawn when dew is still present.
Dry the harvested taraxacum officinale in a well-ventilated area for 7-10 days or until crumbly texture achieved.
Grind 50g of dried taraxacum officinale into fine powder using a mortar and pestle within 24 hours of drying.
Mix 2:1 ratio of taraxacum officinale powder with silica gel and fill #0 capsules to achieve 250mg per capsule.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or until consumed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Evening primrose capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an omega-6 fatty acid that supports hormone production and regulation. GLA helps to reduce inflammation, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances, and also supports the body's natural ability to produce hormones such as estrogen and progesterone. Additionally, evening primrose oil contains other nutrients like vitamins A, D, and E, as well as antioxidants, which work together to promote healthy hormone production and balance.
remedy_properties: Gamma-Linolenic Acid (GLA): Helps to regulate hormone production by reducing inflammation and promoting the conversion of omega-6 fatty acids into anti-inflammatory prostaglandins, which can alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances.

Fatty Acids: Contribute to the regulation of hormone synthesis and metabolism, particularly in relation to estrogen and progesterone levels, helping to maintain a healthy balance between these hormones.

Phytoestrogens: Contain plant-derived estrogens that can mimic or complement human estrogen, helping to stabilize hormone fluctuations and alleviate symptoms such as hot flashes, mood swings, and vaginal dryness associated with menopause and premenstrual syndrome (PMS).
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which helps regulate hormonal imbalances and supports reproductive health.
Seeds: High in fatty acids, including GLA, which has anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality oenothera biennis leaves and stems in the morning after dew has dried.
Dry the harvested plant material using a food dehydrator or air circulation for 12 hours.
Grind the dried oenothera biennis into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 250mg of the powdered oenothera biennis with 500mg of silica gel and fill capsules with a capsule machine.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container for up to 6 months at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain a potent phytoestrogenic compound called anethole, which binds to estrogen receptors in the body. This binding action can help regulate estrogen levels, alleviating symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as PMS, mood swings, and hot flashes. Additionally, fennel's natural anti-inflammatory properties may also reduce inflammation associated with hormonal imbalances, promoting a healthy balance of hormones and overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Estrogenic properties: Fennel contains a compound called anethole, which has been shown to mimic the effects of estrogen in the body, helping to balance out hormone levels and alleviate symptoms of menopause, PMS, and other hormone-related disorders.

Progestogenic properties: Fennel also contains compounds that have progestogenic activity, which can help regulate progesterone levels and improve uterine function, reducing the risk of irregular periods, cramps, and other menstrual issues.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects: The antioxidants and flavonoids present in fennel capsules can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances and related health problems.
remedy_parts: Roots: Fennel roots are good at regulating hormones and alleviating symptoms of menopause due to their high content of estrogen-like compounds.
Seeds: Fennel seeds have been traditionally used to treat hormonal imbalances, including PMS symptoms, due to their ability to stimulate the body's natural hormone production.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality foeniculum vulgare leaves and flowers in their optimal growing season.
Dry the harvested plant material in a warm well-ventilated area for 7-10 days.
Crush the dried plant material into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder.
Mix the powdered herb with gelatin capsules at a ratio of 500mg herb to 1000mg capsule fill material.
Fill empty capsules with the prepared herbal mixture and seal immediately for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help regulate the body's endocrine system. The active compound curcumin in turmeric has been shown to modulate the production and activity of hormones such as estrogen, progesterone, and testosterone, promoting balance and harmony in the body's hormonal environment. This can lead to relief from symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances, including mood swings, hot flashes, and irregular periods.
remedy_properties: Curcumin: Turmeric's active compound, curcumin, has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, thereby supporting hormonal balance.

Cytokine-modulating activity: Turmeric has been shown to modulate cytokines, which are proteins that play a crucial role in hormone regulation, helping to restore balance to the endocrine system and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.

5-LO enzyme inhibition: Turmeric's curcuminoids have been found to inhibit the 5-lipoxygenase (5-LO) enzyme, which is involved in the production of pro-inflammatory eicosanoids that can disrupt hormone balance, helping to restore balance and reduce inflammation.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: These underground stems have a high concentration of curcumin, which helps regulate estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances.
Roots: Turmeric roots contain a rich source of bioactive compounds that support adrenal function, reducing stress-related hormonal fluctuations and promoting overall hormone balance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality turmeric roots from a trusted source or purchase dried turmeric powder for 300-400 grams.
Dry the raw turmeric roots in a low-temperature oven at 150°f for 24 hours or use a food dehydrator for 12 hours.
Grind the dried turmeric roots into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle to ensure maximum bioavailability.
Mix the ground turmeric powder with a binding agent such as silicon dioxide or magnesium stearate in a ratio of 1:2 and compress into capsules of 500mg each using a capsule machine.
Store the finished curcuma longa capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or freeze for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because of its rich composition of phytoestrogens, which are plant-based compounds that mimic the effects of estrogen in the body. These phytoestrogens work by binding to estrogen receptors, regulating the balance of estrogen and progesterone levels, and alleviating symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as hot flashes, mood swings, and irregular periods. Additionally, the capsules also contain other nutrients and antioxidants that support overall hormone health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Maidenhair tree capsules contain antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by reducing the negative impact of free radicals on hormone production and regulation.

Estrogen-balancing properties: The capsules' phytoestrogens (plant-based estrogens) work to balance estrogen levels in the body, helping to alleviate symptoms of estrogen dominance, such as hot flashes, mood swings, and breast tenderness.

Adaptogenic properties: Maidenhair tree capsules contain adaptogens that help the body respond to stress by regulating cortisol levels and promoting a sense of calm, which can reduce the impact of hormonal imbalances on overall health and well-being.
remedy_parts: Roots: Maidenhair tree roots contain bioactive compounds that help regulate hormonal balance by reducing estrogen dominance and promoting progesterone production.

Barks: The barks of the maidenhair tree contain flavonoids and saponins that have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance such as breast tenderness and mood swings.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ginkgo biloba leaves from a trusted supplier or your own garden measuring out 100 grams of dried leaf material per batch.
Clean and dry the harvested leaves by gently blowing away any debris and spreading them on paper towels for two hours.
Combine the clean leaves with 200 milliliters of ethanol and allow the mixture to steep at room temperature for four hours.
Filter the liquid using a cheesecloth or coffee filter pressing out as much liquid as possible from the plant material measuring out 500 milligrams of extract per capsule.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the prepared ginkgo biloba extract and seal tightly storing them in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ashwagandha capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain adaptogenic properties that help regulate cortisol levels, which in turn stabilizes other hormones such as insulin, thyroid, and estrogen. By reducing stress-induced cortisol production, ashwagandha promotes a balanced adrenal response, allowing the body to naturally regulate its hormone production. This leads to improvements in symptoms of PMS, menopause, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), as well as enhanced fertility and overall reproductive health.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic and Stress-Reducing Properties: Ashwagandha helps to reduce stress levels, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by regulating the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis, allowing for a more balanced release of hormones.

Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Effects: Ashwagandha's antioxidant properties help to combat oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by reducing inflammation in the endocrine system and promoting healthy hormone function.

Hormone-Supporting Properties: Ashwagandha has been shown to support the production of thyroid hormones, as well as regulate cortisol and insulin levels, helping to promote a balanced endocrine system and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as fatigue, mood swings, and weight gain.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Ashwagandha are rich in antioxidants and adaptogenic compounds, which help regulate hormone production and balance cortisol levels.
Stems: The stems of Ashwagandha contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have been shown to reduce inflammation and modulate the endocrine system, promoting hormonal balance.
remedy_recipe: Source high-quality dried ashwagandha roots and grind them into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 30 seconds.
Combine the ground ashwagandha powder with 500mg of gelatin in a bowl and mix well for 10 minutes.
Add 100ml of distilled water to the mixture and stir until it forms a uniform paste, allowing it to sit for 15 minutes.
Use a capsule filler machine or spoon to fill clean vegetable capsules with the paste, ensuring each capsule contains 250mg of the mixture for 20 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight, allowing them to mature for 24 hours before consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Borage capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain the plant hormone-like compound, phytoestrogen. This natural substance has been shown to mimic the effects of estrogen in the body, helping to regulate and balance hormone levels. Additionally, borage's gamma-linolenic acid (GLA) content has anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm hormonal imbalances. By addressing underlying hormonal issues, borage capsules may alleviate symptoms such as PMS, mood swings, and hot flashes, promoting overall reproductive health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Gamma-Linolenic Acid (GLA): GLA, an omega-6 fatty acid found in borage oil, helps reduce inflammation and supports hormone regulation by converting to prostaglandins that promote healthy hormonal balance.

Omega-3 Fatty Acids: Borage capsules contain a unique combination of omega-3 and omega-6 essential fatty acids, which help regulate hormonal imbalances by influencing the production of prostaglandins and leukotrienes, reducing inflammation and promoting healthy hormone function.

Vitex (Chasteberry): Some borage capsules may include Vitex or chasteberry extract, which helps regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of PMS, and support hormonal balance by acting on the pituitary gland to reduce prolactin levels and promote regular ovulation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in triterpenoid saponins, which help to regulate hormone production and balance estrogen levels.
Flowers: Contain essential fatty acids, vitamins, and minerals that support adrenal gland function and help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of fresh or dried borago officinalis flowers and leaves from a trusted source.
Clean and dry the harvested plant material by spreading it out in a single layer and allowing air circulation for 24 hours.
Grind 25 grams of the dried borago officinalis material into a fine powder using a mill or coffee grinder.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the powdered borago officinalis with 500 ml of water to create an herbal infusion that steeps for 8 hours at room temperature.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the strained and cooled herbal infusion mixture and store them in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Saw palmetto capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to block the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that can contribute to an overactive androgen environment in the body. By reducing DHT levels, saw palmetto may help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as acne, excessive hair growth, and prostate issues. Additionally, its antioxidant properties may also help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, promoting overall hormonal balance and well-being.
remedy_properties: SerenoGenin: Saw palmetto's main active compound, SerenoGenin, inhibits the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a potent androgen hormone that can contribute to hormonal imbalances in both men and women.

Antioxidant properties: Saw palmetto's rich antioxidant content helps protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation, which can disrupt hormonal balance and lead to various health issues such as acne, hair loss, and hot flashes.

5-alpha-reductase inhibition: Saw palmetto has been shown to inhibit 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme that converts testosterone into DHT, thereby reducing the production of this hormone and alleviating symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).
remedy_parts: Fruits: Fatty acids and phytosterols in saw palmetto fruits help regulate hormone production, reducing symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
Seeds: Rich in lipids and steroidal compounds, saw palmetto seeds are believed to inhibit the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a key factor in hormonal imbalance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried serenoa repens leaves and stems from reputable sources.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Measure out 250 milligrams of the powdered herb and mix it with 100 milligrams of silicon dioxide filler in a small bowl.
Fill empty #0 gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture and seal them tightly using a capsule filling machine.
Store the finished serenoa repens capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginseng capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain adaptogenic properties that help regulate the body's natural production of hormones. The herbs in ginseng capsules, such as Panax ginseng and Ashwagandha, have been shown to normalize cortisol levels, alleviate stress, and promote a healthy thyroid function, all of which are essential for maintaining hormonal balance. Additionally, ginseng has been found to enhance insulin sensitivity, regulate blood sugar levels, and support the production of estrogen and testosterone, making it an effective natural remedy for addressing hormonal imbalance issues.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: Ginseng's adaptogenic properties allow it to help balance the body's response to stress, which is linked to hormonal imbalances and can contribute to conditions like polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) and thyroid dysfunction.

Antioxidant properties: Ginseng's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can damage hormone-producing glands and disrupt hormone function, leading to hormonal imbalance and related issues such as hot flashes and mood swings.

Inflammation-reducing properties: Ginseng has been shown to reduce inflammation in the body, which is associated with hormonal imbalances and conditions like endometriosis and fibroids. Reducing inflammation can help restore balance to hormone production.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, ginseng roots help regulate hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause.
Rhyzomes: The rhizome of ginseng contains saponins, which have been shown to improve insulin sensitivity and support hormone regulation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality panax ginseng roots and wash them thoroughly with distilled water.
Dry the washed roots in a warm oven at 150°f for 6 hours or until brittle.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one part ground root powder with one part gelatin to create a uniform blend and fill capsules with the mixture.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wild yam capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain diosgenin, a natural compound that helps to balance estrogen levels in the body. This can be particularly beneficial for women experiencing symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, as well as those dealing with polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). By supporting the body's natural hormonal regulation, wild yam capsules can help to reduce symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance, promoting a sense of balance and well-being.
remedy_properties: Diosgenin: Wild yam contains diosgenin, a saponin compound that has been shown to have estrogen-like effects in the body, helping to regulate and balance hormone levels.

Saponins: The saponin content in wild yam capsules helps to stimulate the production of progesterone in the adrenal glands, which can help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as PMS and menopause-related hot flashes.

Phytoestrogens: Wild yam contains phytoestrogens, which are plant-based compounds that mimic the effects of estrogen in the body. This can help to calm the body's response to hormonal fluctuations, reducing symptoms like anxiety and mood swings.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the wild yam plant contain diosgenin, a precursor to progesterone, making it effective in supporting hormonal balance and alleviating symptoms of menopause.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the wild yam plant have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances, such as bloating and cramps.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dioscorea villosa roots and clean them thoroughly removing any dirt debris or excess moisture.
Dry the cleaned roots in a warm dark place for 7-10 days or use a food dehydrator on low heat.
Grind dried dioscorea villosa root into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500mg of powdered dioscorea villosa root with 100mg of silica gel in a small bowl and fill capsules immediately.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Parsley capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains apigenin, a flavonoid that has been shown to modulate estrogen receptors and improve hormone sensitivity. Additionally, parsley is rich in antioxidants, which help protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation, common contributors to hormonal imbalances. By supporting healthy estrogen levels and reducing oxidative stress, parsley capsules can help regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate PMS symptoms, and promote overall reproductive health. This natural supplement can be a valuable addition to a comprehensive hormone-balancing regimen.
remedy_properties: Estrogenic compounds: Parsley contains estrogen-like compounds that can help to balance hormonal levels by mimicking the effects of estrogen in the body, which can alleviate symptoms of menopause and PMS.

Flavonoids and antioxidants: The flavonoids and antioxidants present in parsley capsules have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation associated with hormonal imbalance and promote overall health and well-being.

Folic acid: Parsley is a rich source of folic acid, a B vitamin that plays a crucial role in hormone regulation and can help to alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalances such as mood swings, fatigue, and anxiety by supporting the production of neurotransmitters.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds like umbelliferone, which helps regulate hormone production and balance.
Seeds: Containing omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants, these seeds support hormonal regulation and reduce inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried petroselinum crispum leaves from a trusted source or your own garden.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 15 minutes.
Mix the ground petroselinum crispum powder with 200 grams of gelatin to create a uniform blend.
Fill #0 capsules with 400 milligrams of the petroselinum crispum-gelatin blend and seal immediately.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian capsules helps with hormonal imbalance because they support the body's natural ability to regulate hormone production. The herb valerian root has a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help reduce stress and anxiety that can contribute to hormonal imbalances. By promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol levels, valerian capsules may help balance estrogen and progesterone hormones in women, leading to improved menstrual regularity and reduced symptoms of menopause. Additionally, valerian's sedative properties can help regulate the body's natural sleep-wake cycle, further supporting overall hormonal balance.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: Valerian helps to balance the body's response to stress, which can alleviate hormonal imbalances caused by chronic stress and promote overall endocrine system function.

Sedative effects: Valerian's sedative properties can help regulate sleep-wake cycles, reducing cortisol levels and promoting a healthy balance of hormones, including melatonin, estrogen, and testosterone.

Estrogen-balancing compounds: Valerian contains flavonoids that have been shown to have estrogen-like effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as hot flashes, mood swings, and breast tenderness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Valerian roots are rich in alkaloids, particularly valerenic acid, which helps to regulate hormone production and balance hormonal imbalances.

Rhyzomes: Valerian rhyzomes contain a high concentration of sesquiterpenes, which have a sedative effect on the nervous system, helping to alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as anxiety and insomnia.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried valeriana officinalis roots of high-quality and pure extract.
Grind 100g of dried roots into fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered root with 20% hawthorn berries and 10% lavender flowers by weight.
Encapsulate the mixture in vegetarian capsules at a dosage of 250mg per capsule.
Store the prepared capsules in an airtight container for up to 12 months or until expiration.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hormonal imbalance with herbal capsules is by combining specific herbs that target individual hormone imbalances. For instance, Chasteberry (Vitex agnus-castus) helps regulate estrogen levels, while Maca root stimulates testosterone production. Ashwagandha and Ginseng help reduce cortisol stress response. Additionally, Black Cohosh and Dong Quai alleviate menopausal symptoms. It's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before starting herbal supplements, as they can interact with medications or have adverse effects in certain individuals.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hormonal imbalance that are treated with herbal capsules are menopausal symptoms, thyroid disorders, adrenal fatigue, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). Herbal supplements such as black cohosh, maca, ashwagandha, and chasteberry help alleviate hot flashes, mood swings, fatigue, and irregular periods associated with these conditions. They also support hormone production, balance, and regulation to promote overall well-being.
